coreIssue: This bi-weekly check-in should center on how Priya wants to build on a recent delivery win into visible senior-level mentoring and upcoming billing rewrite scope.
openingQuestion: What would make the payments refactor feel like a useful springboard for the kind of mentoring and ownership you want next?
listenFor: whether they volunteer a specific part of the refactor they want recognized or repeated
whether they name last week's quieter standups as energy, focus, or simply having less to report
whether they describe mentoring in concrete terms like one person, one project, or a regular cadence
avoid: do not turn the quieter standups into an implicit wellbeing diagnosis or pressure them to explain their mood
do not present the billing rewrite as a done deal before checking what ownership and context would actually help a senior engineer succeed
goodOutcome: You and Priya have agreed one concrete senior-level mentoring responsibility or ownership slice she wants to take on as the billing rewrite comes into view.
suggestedAction: During the 1:1, share one specific example of the payments refactor impact you saw, then ask Priya to choose one mentoring or billing-related responsibility she would like to own next.
